description_long: This object consists of two miniature windmills, each with a short cylindrical base and a small rotor with several blades. The windmills appear to be constructed from a metallic material, with a silvery-gray finish and darker accents on the tops and bases. The blades are arranged around a central hub and are oriented vertically, suggesting a vertical-axis design. The bases are compact and squat, lacking any visible lattice or tubular tower structure. The overall size and proportions indicate these are likely decorative or model windmills rather than functional, full-scale devices. The surfaces are hard and slightly reflective, with a smooth metallic sheen.
description: A pair of small, metallic, vertical-axis windmills with cylindrical bases and compact rotors. The surfaces are silvery-gray and smooth, with dark accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing both windmills side by side, highlighting their cylindrical bases and vertical rotors.
description_view_1: Angled view from the right, revealing the relative spacing and the tops of the windmill bases.
description_view_2: Rear view, displaying the backs of the windmills and the symmetry of their design.
description_view_3: Angled view from the left, showing the side profiles and the tops of the rotors.
